translationX.description: The displacement of the object along the X-axis in the 3D coordinate system

translationY.description: The displacement of the object along the Y-axis in the 3D coordinate system

translationZ.description: The displacement of the object along the Z-axis in the 3D coordinate system

eulerRotationX.description: The rotation of the object around the X-axis in radians

eulerRotationY.description: The rotation of the object around the Y-axis in radians

eulerRotationZ.description: The rotation of the object around the Z-axis in radians

scaleX.description: The scaling factor applied to the object along the X-axis

scaleY.description: The scaling factor applied to the object along the Y-axis

scaleZ.description: The scaling factor applied to the object along the Z-axis

views.description: The Cognite3DTransformation object defines a comprehensive 3D transformation, enabling precise adjustments to an object's position, orientation, and size in the 3D coordinate system. It allows for the translation of objects along the three spatial axes, rotation around these axes using Euler angles, and scaling along each axis to modify the object's dimensions. The object's transformation is defined in "CDF space", a coordinate system where the positive Z axis is the up direction

tags.description: Text based labels for generic use, limited to 1000

sourceContext.description: Context of the source id. For systems where the sourceId is globally unique, the sourceContext is expected to not be set.

source.description: Direct relation to a source system

sourceCreatedTime.description: When the instance was created in source system (if available)

sourceUpdatedTime.description: When the instance was last updated in the source system (if available)

sourceCreatedUser.description: User identifier from the source system on who created the source data. This identifier is not guaranteed to match the user identifiers in CDF

sourceUpdatedUser.description: User identifier from the source system on who last updated the source data. This identifier is not guaranteed to match the user identifiers in CDF

confidence.description: The confidence that the annotation is a good match

startNodePageNumber.description: The number of the page on which this annotation is located in `startNode` File. The first page has number 1

endNodePageNumber.description: The number of the page on which this annotation is located in the endNode File if an endNode is present. The first page has number 1

startNodeXMin.description: Value between [0,1]. Minimum abscissa of the bounding box (left edge). Must be strictly less than startNodeXMax

startNodeXMax.description: Value between [0,1]. Maximum abscissa of the bounding box (right edge). Must be strictly more than startNodeXMin

startNodeYMin.description: Value between [0,1]. Minimum ordinate of the bounding box (bottom edge). Must be strictly less than startNodeYMax

startNodeYMax.description: Value between [0,1]. Maximum ordinate of the bounding box (top edge). Must be strictly more than startNodeYMin

startNodeText.description: The text extracted from within the bounding box on the startNode

endNodeXMin.description: Value between [0,1]. Minimum abscissa of the bounding box (left edge). Must be strictly less than endNodeXMax. Only applicable if an endNode is defined

endNodeXMax.description: Value between [0,1]. Maximum abscissa of the bounding box (right edge). Must be strictly more than endNodeXMin. Only applicable if an endNode is defined

endNodeYMin.description: Value between [0,1]. Minimum ordinate of the bounding box (bottom edge). Must be strictly less than endNodeYMax. Only applicable if an endNode is defined

endNodeYMax.description: Value between [0,1]. Maximum ordinate of the bounding box (top edge). Must be strictly more than endNodeYMin. Only applicable if an endNode is defined

endNodeText.description: The text extracted from within the bounding box on the endNode. Only applicable if an endNode is defined

quantity.description: Specifies the physical quantity the unit measures

sourceReference.description: Reference to the source of the unit definition

views.description: Represents a single unit of measurement
